Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: We build the foundation of a stroker LS that would be a PERFECT fit for a hot rod!
Video.title: Pro LS Bottom End Build

Video.summary: We complete our stroker LS powerplant and put it to the ultimate performance test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Pro LS on the Dyno

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Once we finish assembly on our improved Compression Obsession SBC, we’ll run this mule on the dyno.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: More Power

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie upgrade internal components to make our blue oval beast more durable under boost.
Video.title: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: It's the start of our all new MuscleTrux series and to kick it off, Ford versus Chevy.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 1

Video.summary: Bowtie boy Ryan's got a big play for using big displacement to make big power for his entry.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 2: 1990 Chevrolet 454 SS

Video.summary: It's Blue Oval boy Kevin's turn to take over the shop.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 3: 1994 Ford Lightning

Video.summary: It's another shot in our MuscleTrux series as Kevin's 1994 Ford Lightning prepares for battle.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 4

Video.summary: Ryan returns fire as his 1990 Chevy 454 SS also gets dropped down into the weeds.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 5

Video.summary: It's a chassis dyno shootout to see what kind of power our sport trucks are making.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 6

Video.summary: It's finally time to lay it on the line as we put the two trucks in head to head competition.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 7

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: We’re turning our 1964 Ford Flatbed into a shop truck!
Video.title: Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck

Image.alt: Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck
Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck
Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck

Video.summary: The guys in Detroit Muscle are taking a step back to 1973 with their AMC Javelin project.
Video.title: AMC Javelin

Video.summary: Transforming a stock Jeep Wrangler to look and perform better than the Tomb Raider 2 Jeep.
Video.title: Project Tomb Raider PT. 1

Video.summary: Continuing the transformation of our Jeep TJ into a rig worthy of Tomb Raider 2.
Video.title: Project Tomb Raider PT. 2

Video.summary: Final steps of Project Tomb Raider: snorkel, bumpers, and winch.
Video.title: Project Tomb Raider PT. 3

Video.summary: Today, we're starting a project to build an awesome 1937 Ford!
Video.title: Starting Project Hot Rod Truck

Video.summary: Today, Project Hot Rod Truck gets it's drivetrain in the form of a hot small block Ford V8.
Video.title: A Train for Project HRT

Video.summary: With the driveline in place, now it's time to work on the body.
Video.title: Body Work for Project HRT

Video.summary: First our frame will be turned into a work of art.
Video.title: Project HRT Part 4

Video.summary: Today we're painting Project HRT!
Video.title: Project HRT Part 5

Video.summary: We'll get you up caught up on all the work we've done to Project HRT.
Video.title: HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson

Image.alt: HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson
HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson
HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson

Video.summary: We plumb the turbocharger in our 1964 Ford Flatbed truck and install the fuel and cooling systems.
Video.title: Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride

Image.alt: Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride
Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride
Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride

Video.summary: We bring our now turbocharged 1964 Ford F350 flatbed shop truck back for upgrades.
Video.title: 1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades

Image.alt: 1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades
1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades
1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: We picked up a 1985 Chevy K-10 with a plan to do a full rebuild.
Video.title: Hip to be Square Body

Video.summary: Chris Ryan's "Scarlet Lady," a custom '56 Continental Mark II, embodies truly extraordinary craftsmanship.
Video.title: Chris Ryan - Scarlet Lady

Video.summary: HorsePower builds a '97 sleeper Thunderbird
Video.title: Project Deep Sleep

Video.summary: Project Deep Sleep gets a horsepower wake-up call.
Video.title: Deep Sleep's Engine Build

Video.summary: It’s gonna take some time but our ’92 Chevy Camaro gets some serious upgrades.
Video.title: Wide Body Autocross Camaro

Video.summary: From freeway to farmyard, this rugged straight six was everywhere! It’s the subject of our latest build.
Video.title: Ford 300 Inline Six

Video.summary: Even after 45 years, our antique Ford engine still runs.
Video.title: A Fine Inline Six

Video.summary: The six-cylinder Ford’s numbers keep climbing as we give it major cam, piston, and cylinder head upgrades.
Video.title: Ford’s Big Buzzin’ Half Dozen

Video.summary: Our famous Ford 300 comes home to the Engine Power shop for even BIGGER POWER upgrades.
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 1

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 dream build continues, assembling for big dyno power!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 2

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 returns for dyno showdown: naturally aspirated vs. boosted!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 3

Video.summary: "Deep Sleep" gets a wake-up call from a new 610-horsepower engine.
Video.title: Deep Sleep Engine Drop

Video.summary: "Deep Sleep" fires up for HorsePower payoff.
Video.title: Deep Sleep - Final Touches
